releaseNotes:
• New setting: Max Reconnect Attempts (Settings → Buffering). Controls how many times the app retries a failed stream before giving up — applies to both full-screen playback and multi-view cells. Default: 6. Range: 1–10. Previously hardcoded to 6 (full-screen) and 5 (multi-view).
• Code cleanup: removed internal fix-number labels from source comments. No behaviour change.
